B.      COMTES d'AUMÂLE (BLOIS-CHAMPAGNE)
 

 

EUDES de Troyes, son of ETIENNE I Comte de Troyes [Blois] & his wife Adela --- (-after [1115/18]).  "Odo puer nepos comiti Tethberti" witnessed a charte …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes d’Aumâle於1117年出生在英國越可爾霍爾德內斯時，她的父親Estienne de Troyes57歲，母親Hawise de Mortimer39歲。她和Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland至少有4個兒子。她去世於1170年在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭克利夫蘭吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes d’Aumâle于1117年出生在英国越可爾霍爾德內斯时，她的父亲Estienne de Troyes57岁，母亲Hawise de Mortimer39岁。她和Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland至少有4个儿子。她去世于1170年在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰克利夫蘭吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes d’Aumâle was born in 1117, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, her father, Estienne de Troyes, was 57 and her mother, Hawise de Mortimer, was 39. She had at least 4 sons with Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland. She died in 1170, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Guisborough, Cleveland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes d’Aumâle est née en 1117, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Estienne de Troyes, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Mortimer, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland. Elle est décédée en 1170, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Guisborough, Cleveland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes d’Aumâle 1117 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Estienne de Troyes 57 und ihre Mutter Hawise de Mortimer 39. Sie hatte mit Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1170 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Skelton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Guisborough, Cleveland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes d’Aumâle è nata il nel 1117 nel Holderness, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Estienne de Troyes, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Hawise de Mortimer, aveva 39 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland. Morì nel 1170, nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Guisborough, Cleveland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes d’Aumâleが1117年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスで生まれた時，父Estienne de Troyesは57歳，母Hawise de Mortimerは39歳であった。彼女はAdam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Clevelandとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1170年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクレベランドグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes d’Aumâle(이)가 1117년 영국 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Estienne de Troyes(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de Mortimer(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 클레벨랜드 길스버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes d’Aumâle nasceu em 1117, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Estienne de Troyes, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Mortimer, tinha 39 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland. Ela faleceu em 1170, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Guisborough, Cleveland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes d’Aumâle родилась в 1117 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Estienne de Troyes было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Mortimer, 39. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland. Она умерла в 1170 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности гуисбороую, кливеланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes d’Aumâle nació en 1117, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Estienne de Troyes, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Hawise de Mortimer, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland. Murió en 1170, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Guisborough, Cleveland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
